title: Citizenship ceremony - Canada.ca
content:
## Citizenship ceremony
For most citizenship applicants, the citizenship ceremony is the last step before becoming a Canadian citizen.
If you’re a citizenship candidate, the ceremony is
- a special, dignified and meaningful occasion where you take the oath of citizenship
- an opportunity to reflect on the rights and responsibilities of citizenship celebrate with your family and friends
- reflect on the rights and responsibilities of citizenship
- celebrate with your family and friends

### Find a citizenship ceremony near you
As a member of the public or an elected official, you can attend most in-person ceremonies to support new citizens.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
